dvids.title: Frank E. Petersen Jr. Supports Operation Epic Fury
dvids.desc: Arleigh Burke-class guided-missile destroyer USS Frank E. Petersen Jr. (DDG 121) fires a Tomahawk Land Attack Missile (TLAM) during operations in support of Operation Epic Fury in the U.S. Central Command area of responsibility, March 9, 2026. (U.S. Navy video)
